summary: Diff adds state and handlers in AppointmentDialog to support selecting/clearing an existing client and to bypass duplicate-reference validation when an existing client is selected. However, the provided diff snippet is truncated before the JSX/render portion, so it does not conclusively show the presence/visibility rules of the selector control in create vs edit mode.

missing_requirements.requirement: The client selection control is not shown (or is disabled) when editing an existing appointment, unless it previously existed in edit mode.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows state reset when `appointment` exists (edit mode) but does not include the rendered UI/conditional logic to verify the selector is hidden/disabled in edit mode due to truncation.
evidence: frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialog.tsx (truncated; contains edit-mode form population and `setSelectedExistingClient(null)` but not the JSX that would show/hide/disable the selector)
